    quadraticCurveTo(double, double) - Static method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.SVGUtils
    Creates an instance of the path element SVGPathElement.SVGQuadraticCurveTo that uses relative coordinates.

    Creates an instance of the path element SVGPathElement.SVGQuadraticCurveTo that uses relative coordinates.

    quadraticCurveToAbs(double, double) - Static method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.SVGUtils
    Creates an instance of the path element SVGPathElement.SVGQuadraticCurveTo that uses absolute coordinates.
    quadraticCurveToAbs(double, double, double, double) - Static method in class org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.SVGUtils
    Creates an instance of the path element SVGPathElement.SVGQuadraticCurveTo that uses absolute coordinates.
